attributes.name: card-slot
attributes.description: Applied to a slotted child used in card composition, allowing the child to style itself for a card context.

attributes.name: condensed-slot
attributes.description: Applied to a slotted child used in condensed composition, allowing the child to reduce spacing and density.

attributes.name: condensed-slot-first
attributes.description: Applied to the first slat in condensed card body content, allowing exposed top edge radius to match the card.

attributes.name: condensed-slot-last
attributes.description: Applied to the last slat in condensed card body content, allowing exposed bottom edge radius to match the card.
